creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #7)
> The full cycle of update looks like follows

Of course, need to determine the PORTVERSION, based on changed date of ${WRKSRC} directory, after "make create-distfile" command, then rerun it again with "make recreate-distfile" command, but I did it already. The distinfo in new proposed patch will be correct, if there are no changes to styles of nightly tarball, before it could be hosted with different version. Otherwise, the PORTVERSION need to be fixed also.
